fundamentals.name: ASML Holding N.V. - New York Re

judgment.summary: ASML demonstrates robust growth, high profitability, and strong cash flow, albeit with a high valuation multiple.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 8.0%; next earnings date is 2026-07-15.
positives: Revenue growth 13.2% YoY and earnings growth 19.2% YoY indicate strong top and bottom-line expansion.
Profit margin 29.7% and operating margin 36.0% show excellent operational efficiency.
Return on equity 52.2% is exceptionally high, demonstrating effective use of shareholder capital.
Free cash flow $8.24B TTM and $8.38B cash provide significant financial flexibility.
Consensus rating is strong buy with a mean target price above the current stock price.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 52.34 and Forward P/E of 33.14 indicate a high valuation.
PEG ratio of 2.32 suggests that future growth may already be priced in.
Debt/Equity ratio of 12.99 is high, though offset by strong cash and FCF.
Quick ratio of 0.69 suggests potential short-term liquidity constraints if inventory cannot be sold quickly.

news.paragraph: ASML is being highlighted as a top AI stock with a wide economic moat, and is also noted as a significant holding in billionaire Ken Fisher's portfolio. These mentions suggest continued investor confidence in the company's market position and future prospects within the AI sector. The stock's recent positive press, coupled with strong analyst sentiment, points to a favorable outlook.

headlines.title: ASML (ASML): AI Stock With The Widest Moat?
This is Why ASML Holding NV (ASML) is One of the Top Tech Stocks in Billionaire Ken Fisher’s Portfolio
